title: Building an AI Assistant Concept
subtitle: design your own smart assistant!
overview: This session introduces students to the concept of AI assistants and how they help people in daily life. Students learn how AI assistants listen, understand, respond, and automate tasks. Through creative activities, students design their own smart assistant ideas for solving real-world problems.

images._note: Add photos of chatbot demos, voice assistants, app mockups, brainstorming activities, and student presentations.

keyTopics: Voice Assistants — Siri, Alexa, Google Assistant
Chatbots — AI systems that answer questions
Natural Language Processing (NLP) — Understanding human language
Building AI Solutions for Real Problems

activity.title: Design Your Own AI Assistant
steps: Choose a real-world problem students face
Brainstorm how an AI assistant could help
Give the assistant a name and personality
Sketch the app or device interface
Present the assistant idea to the class

options: A smart system that helps users using AI
quiz.explanation: AI assistants use artificial intelligence to help users perform tasks and answer questions.

quiz.q: Which is an example of an AI assistant?
quiz.explanation: Alexa, Siri, and Google Assistant are popular AI assistants.
NLP helps computers understand and process human language.

quiz.q: What is the main job of a chatbot?
options: Answer questions and interact with users
quiz.explanation: Chatbots communicate with users and provide information or support.

quiz.q: How do voice assistants understand commands?
quiz.explanation: Voice assistants use AI and speech recognition to understand spoken language.
Automation allows systems to perform tasks without constant human control.

quiz.q: Why is design thinking important for AI products?
options: It helps solve user problems effectively
quiz.explanation: Design thinking focuses on understanding users and creating useful solutions.

quiz.q: What is the first step in designing an AI assistant?
quiz.explanation: Good AI assistants are designed to solve real problems.

quiz.q: Which skill is important for building AI assistant ideas?
quiz.explanation: AI innovation combines creativity, communication, and problem-solving skills.

quiz.q: How can AI assistants help society?
quiz.explanation: AI assistants can improve daily life in many different areas.
